title: KBR Q3 Earnings Beat & Revenues Miss Estimates, Shares Down
text: KBR's third-quarter earnings reflect solid STS growth and strong execution across the business.

title: Otis Worldwide Corporation (OTIS) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE:OTIS ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 26, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Michael Rednor - Senior Director of Investor Relations Judy Marks - President, Chief Executive Officer and Chairman Anurag Maheshwari - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Nigel Coe - Wolfe Research Jeffrey Sprague - Vertical Research Julian Mitchell - Barclays Stephen Tusa - JPMorgan John Walsh - Credit Suisse Joseph O'Dea - Wells Fargo Gautam Khanna - Cowen Joel Spungin - Berenberg Operator Good day and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Otis' Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Q3 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.56% and 2.76%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Factors Setting the Tone for Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Q3 Earnings
text: Otis Worldwide's (OTIS) third-quarter results are expected to reflect the adverse impacts of inflation.
